items.title: Dow and Nasdaq plunge 2% as Amazon data centres hit in Iran war
items.description: 10.32am: Iran is 'not just oil any more' as AWS damage moves dial US stocks have extended their slide, with selling accelerating asthe first hour of trading ticks past. The Dow is now down 1,244 points or 2.5% at 47,650, while its descent has been overtaken by the Nasdaq, which has plunged...

items.title: Live On CNBC, Josh Brown Hosts Segment Titled "Josh's Best Best Stock Spotlight: Chemicals"
